GYM LAUNCH

HYBRID
IN-GYM LAUNCH
RESOURCES
Abundance
Theory And
Tactics
The second of The 5 Core Habits - Abundance. Thinking
with Abundance and actually doing it.
Abundance Theory
- ""You will get all that you want in life, if you help enough
other people get what they want."" - ZZ
- Giving changes YOU
- The more you TEACH the more you LEARN
- You gain status by providing value
- People want to help people they perceive as giving -
reciprocity
- Understand there is unlimited money
Abundance Tactics
- If you have something that works, share it, expect nothing
in return.
- Tell someone everyday that you appreciate them.
- Hop on with other Gym Lords
